exam_name: Palo Alto Networks Certified Security Automation Engineer (PCSAE)

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers or online proctored (OnVUE)

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match Pearson VUE registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Palo Alto Networks products. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Certifications valid for 2 years. Renew by passing a recertification exam or a higher-level exam. Continuing education pathway also available.

retake_policy.notes: 15-day waiting period after failed attempt. Full exam fee required for retake.

official_study_resources.title: Palo Alto Networks Education Services
official_study_resources.notes: Official instructor-led and e-learning training aligned to certifications

aliases: palo alto networks certified security automation engineer pcsae
